title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: YOUTH CONTACT INC COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers outpatient counseling for children and youth with behavioral and/or emotional issues including trauma. Also provides substance use disorder treatment with services including prevention and intervention. 447 SE Baseline Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 and their families Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm Email (503) 640-4222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-4222 FAX (503) 640-0334 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP. Some availability to provide services for individuals who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: New client paperwork can be mailed to people before their first appointment LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Mandarin, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Within two blocks of MAX and TriMet bus stops; TriMet bus line 57 TV Highway/Forest Grove Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Eating Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Parent Child Interactive Therapy Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - STUDENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH CONTACT INC
